title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, generate completions, pull & manage models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs entirely locally.

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Community Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; supports chat, generate, embeddings, model management.

title: OllamaSharp – .NET Client
summary: .NET wrapper for Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, pull models, streaming.

title: ollama-rails
summary: Ruby gem that wraps Ollama endpoints; chat, completions, embeddings, model CRUD.

title: Ollama Copilot – VS Code Extension
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models; history, syntax highlighting, keybindings.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop app for chatting with Ollama models (macOS/Linux/Windows).

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for inline code suggestions powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service containers for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-camel
summary: CAMEL-AI framework adapter enabling role-playing agents backed by Ollama models.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration for Ollama; inject ChatService, EmbeddingService beans.

title: ollama-rag
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama embeddings + LangChain + Chroma, runnable in Docker.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server via slash commands.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama; thin wrapper around HTTP API with async dispatch.
